mapper.sql: SELECT d.id, d.code, d.name, d.leader_id, e.name AS leader_name, d.status, d.sort, d.create_time, d.update_time FROM sys_department d LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON d.leader_id = e.id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_department d
AND (d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department (code, name, leader_id, status, sort) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{leaderId}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_department SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WHERE d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.sort ASC, d.id ASC
